76360.subject: 🟪 In defense of markets that sometimes close
76360.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9f199753-ca31-4e3d-9435-5e12896ecff5/BD_NL_Banner_Heading.png?t=1781793903)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bd8a492-ff61-41db-a7f2-c821d481fd72/BD_NL_QuoteCircle.png?t=1781794162)
Caption: 

“We just needed to make it to the weekend.”
_— __Charles Smith, Head of Business Development, Morgan Stanley_



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/82699fce-363e-40c4-b638-bddcdf56f25c/image.png?t=1784755110)
Caption: 

# In defense of markets that sometimes close

Heading into the Columbus Day weekend of 2008, Morgan Stanley looked likely to become the next domino to fall in the Great Financial Crisis.

The bank began the week with $130 billion of cash on the books, which management believed was more than enough to weather the storm. 

But the hedge funds whose withdrawals had sealed the fate of Bear Stearns, Lehman Brothers, and Merrill Lynch were now pulling their money from Morgan Stanley, too — $65 billion of it in a single day.

It was a bank run, and the only thing that seemed likely to stop it was an influx of equity capital from a large investor.

“If we didn’t do a deal, it was over,” CEO John Mack [said](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iPsiYIT79ig) later. “We couldn’t stay in business.”

Fortunately, Mack had agreed to a deal. 

Two weeks earlier, Japan’s Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group (MUFG), the second-largest bank in the world with $1 trillion of customer deposits, had agreed to buy 21% of Morgan Stanley for $9 billion. 

Unfortunately, the deal hadn’t closed yet. 

And the market increasingly doubted it ever would. The deal valued Morgan Stanley at $25.25 a share, but investors did not seem convinced: the shares closed at just $14.22 the day it was announced.

Nine days later, they had fallen to below $10.

This was a problem.

The more the shares went down, the less likely the deal was to close. The less likely it was to close, the more the shares went down.

Even worse: the more the shares went down, the more customers withdrew their money. The more… well, you get the idea.

Morgan Stanley was at the mercy of its stock price, which traded lower day after day.

“We just needed to make it to the weekend,” Smith said later.

The weekend was a circuit breaker — a two-day window for Morgan Stanley to close the deal with MUFG without having to worry about where its shares were trading.

On Saturday, MUFG said it remained committed to investing but

76359.subject: Peptides May Soon Be Legal. These Companies Are Ready To Cash In.
76359.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/peptides-may-soon-legal-companies-ready-cash-forbes-magazine-1kq4c?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BODYPAU%2B%2FTwWlFmw3r7UNeA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1ifISSa2c5UYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrwlagvi~so-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrwlagvi-so
  
Good evening, An FDA panel will meet starting Thursday to consider whether to recommend legal production of seven peptides, and it’s a major event for “the who’s who of the peptide space,” according to Shaun Noorian, founder and CEO of Empower Pharmacy. For compounding pharmacies like Empower, telehealth giant like Hims & Hers and a slew of others, a potential multi-billion-dollar market could soon be in reach. Here’s what to know. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Illustration by Yunjia Yuan for Forbes; Photos by Wragg via Getty Images, eurobanks via Getty Images, Moussa81 via Getty Images Axon Says AI Police Reports Save Time. Public Records Show They Get Facts Wrong More than 600,000 police reports have used Axon’s AI tools, but records show cops have to spend time editing errors. Getty Images Did China's AI Save Hugging Face From Disaster After OpenAI Hack? OpenAI said its models went rogue, broke into Hugging Face’s system and carried out a cyberattack without being ordered to do so.

76358.subject: The Daily Degen - July 22nd, 2026
76358.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-july-22nd-2026

Happy Wednesday friends! Lots of stuff going on!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.329T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $706.63
Gold: $4134.90
Silver: $59.73
Oil (WTI): $86.97
US 10Y Treasury: 4.663%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 39
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Take note fine frogs! @Mantle_Official [ https://substack.com/redirect/c9b31b57-cf95-405d-bee6-4bfeef21f546?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] just turned three years old!
(indeed, you can see your humble editor wishing them happy birthday in the top-left portion of the screenshot from the video at 0:21 below!) 
Their tenure has been marked by all sorts of bullish developments, and most recently the biggest has been RWA’s!
Indeed, Mantle’s RWA history starts way back in 2023, when Ondo and their tokenized treasuries product $USDY first landed on Mantle…
Then came their MI4 fund…
And from there all sorts of huge advancements over the last year, including tokenized equities via @xStocksFi and @Fluxion_network, surging institutional capital focus via Aave and Maple Finance, and- mostly recently- pre-IPO vaults via @OpenstockInc!
This Openstock development is an especially big victory, positioning Mantle at the absolute forefront of the RWA race!
It is just one area that Mantle is stacking W’s in though, and you can learn more about everything else they are doing in their recent H1 breakdown [ https://substack.com/redirect/94a0c2d3-7cf7-454a-82fc-1ed7ed27b0fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
Also make sure to follow @Mantle_Official [ https://substack.com/redirect/c9b31b57-cf95-405d-bee6-4bfeef21f546?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] on Twitter/X, and stay tuned as we keep shining a light on everything that’s happening in their ecosystem!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mixed today. Fastest-growing chains on the weekly with at least $100M TVL include Robinhood Chain, Monad, and Tempo. 
Protocols are also mixed today. Fastest-growing protocols on the weekly with at least $10M TVL include Twyne, Lombard, and Strata.

Editor-in-chief


 Elon Musk doesn’t dither. When I saw him a few months ago at an event in California, I suggested he come on The Insider. He told me to get in touch with him after the SpaceX IPO. I did—via a direct message on X, his social-media platform—and within 24 hours of him thumbs-upping my message someon

76324.subject: RE: Wedding photo+video
76324.body:
Dear Oleg,

There is no obstacle to photography.
The castle is also open on Sunday.
The fee for photography is 45,000 HUF
You will find all the important information in the attachment.
I will send it in English and Slovak.

I have registered you, you can pay on site

Best regards,


From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
Sent: Wednesday, July 22, 2026 11:51 AM
To: Füzérradvány Helyszín <fuzerradvanyikastely@nof.hu>
Subject: Wedding photo+video

Good day,

I would like to reserve a wedding photo session on 26 July 2026, from 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM, for 5 people.

We would like the photo session to take place inside the castle as well as outside in the castle park.

Thank you, and I look forward to your confirmation.

76311.subject: GLS - Dynamické sledovanie zásielky
76311.body: BetterMile /* mobil */ @media only screen and (max-width: 600px){ .wrap { width:100% !important; } .full { display:block !important; width:100% !important; } .p10 { padding:10px !important; } } #outlook a{padding:0;} .ReadMsgBody{width:100%} .ExternalClass{width:100%} .ExternalClass, .ExternalClass p, .ExternalClass span, .ExternalClass td, .ExternalClass div{line-height:100%} img{display:block;border:0;outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic;} table{border-collapse:collapse;border-spacing:0;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt;} 96 Líder v kvalite doručovnia balíkov na Slovensku Vám ďakuje za prejavenú dôveru. Radi by sme Vás informovali, že naša služba dynamického sledovania balíkov Vám umožňuje sledovať balík v reálnom čase. Náš systém neustále aktualizuje čas doručenia na základe aktuálnej polohy balíka. S pozdravom GLS Slovakia. Sledovanie môjho balíka www.gls-group.eu GDPR  |  VOP
